title: Mandarin 3
html:
Mandarin 3

Stub. Yahir's third-year Mandarin class at Grants Pass High in fall 2019 — appears as a logistics item in 2019 08 22 mandarin class swaps ("change the location of Mandarin 3") and as part of the speech/recording prep in 2019 08 18 contact yebw people. The earliest documented step in Yahir's Mandarin pipeline that culminates in the Shanghai/China chapter (2024). Densify when more references surface.
